Keep LOCAL mode strict

Provider routing must honor LOCAL unconditionally, with tests pinning that selectProvider returns the local Ollama provider and embedding/auxiliary work stays local.

Home / Decisions
DecisionFor everyone privacyarchitecture

Context

Prism sells trust through visible local-first behavior, so a LOCAL turn cannot depend on hidden cloud fallback or surprise provider escalation.

Decision

Provider routing must honor LOCAL unconditionally, with tests pinning that selectProvider returns the local Ollama provider and embedding/auxiliary work stays local.

Consequences

New outbound fetch paths need explicit LOCAL guards or must point at configured local services. UI affordances should reflect unavailable online-only features instead of silently switching providers.
